title: Bocage turns terrain into information compression
discovery: Bocage does not just slow movement; it compresses line of sight, collapses routes, and makes surprise more powerful than armor quality.
evidence: source_library/08_operation-cobra.md:15-21 - Cobra is about the shift from bocage attrition to maneuver and the rhino modification workaround.
source_library/10_battle-villers-bocage.md:15-17 - confined roads and surprise dominate vehicle quality.
why: This means bocage should be modeled as a map-reading and route-discovery problem, not only as a movement penalty.

variable.name: route_dependency
variable.definition: How strongly movement depends on a small set of known usable routes.

mechanic: Hidden-route terrain with route discovery and ambush windows.
pressure: The map itself becomes an enemy because every movement choice narrows future options.
